external_desc:
**Title**
Inbound emails from customers to Google Support are experiencing issues.
**Description**
We are experiencing an issue with Google Cloud Support beginning on Tuesday, 2026-06-30 02:03 PDT.
Our engineering team continues to investigate the issue.
We will provide an update by Tuesday, 2026-06-30 05:30 PDT with current details.
We apologize to all who are affected by the disruption.

**Description**

**Title**
Some consumer Google Voice users are experiencing account suspensions.
**Description**
We are experiencing an issue with Google Voice beginning at Monday, 2026-06-22 12:30 PDT.
Our engineering team has identified the root cause and is actively working to mitigate the issue.
We will provide an update by Monday, 2026-06-22 17:30 PDT with current details.

**Title**
Some consumer Google Voice users experienced account suspensions.
